description: Register an Athena IO manager that stores assets as Parquet on S3 and queries them via Amazon Athena

resource_key.label: Resource Key
resource_key.description: Dagster resource key for this IO manager. Use 'io_manager' to make it the default.

s3_staging_dir.label: S3 Staging Dir
s3_staging_dir.description: S3 URI for Athena query results, e.g. 's3://my-bucket/athena-results/'

s3_output_location.label: S3 Output Location
s3_output_location.description: S3 URI prefix where Parquet assets are written, e.g. 's3://my-bucket/assets/'

aws_access_key_env_var.label: AWS Access Key Env Var
aws_access_key_env_var.description: Environment variable for AWS access key (uses instance role if not set)

aws_secret_key_env_var.label: AWS Secret Key Env Var
aws_secret_key_env_var.description: Environment variable for AWS secret key

name: Athena IO Manager
